heading: Funding
label: 1012a Funding
text: In addition to any other funds made available by this chapter, of the funds of the Commodity Credit Corporation, the Secretary shall make available to carry out this chapter $150,000,000 for fiscal year 2026 and each fiscal year thereafter, to remain available until expended.
notes: Amendments2025— substituted “$150,000,000 for fiscal year 2026 and each fiscal year thereafter, to remain available until expended” for “$50,000,000 for fiscal year 2019 and each fiscal year thereafter”.Pub. L. 119–21
amendments: Amendments2025— substituted “$150,000,000 for fiscal year 2026 and each fiscal year thereafter, to remain available until expended” for “$50,000,000 for fiscal year 2019 and each fiscal year thereafter”.Pub. L. 119–21
